headline: TJX Hits $60B Sales Milestone in FY26: What Fuels Long-Term Growth?
summary: TJX posts $60.4B in fiscal 2026 sales, with strong comps, as its flexible model and expansion toward 7,000 stores drive confidence in sustained global growth.

headline: Why Is TJX (TJX) Down 0.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: TJX (TJX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks for Long-Term Investors
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is full of established businesses, but only some continue to outperform the market. A few standout companies are thriving thanks to strong fundamentals and sustained competitive advantages.

raw.headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks for Long-Term Investors

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider TJX Companies (TJX) After A 32% One Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether TJX Companies at around US$157.57 still offers value, or if the easier gains on this stock have already been realized. Over the past year the share price delivered a 32.3% return, with shorter term moves of 1.9% over 7 days, a 0.1% decline over 30 days, and a 2.1% return year to date. These shifts can hint at changing views on its growth potential and risk. Recent coverage has focused on TJX Companies as a major off-price retailer in a competitive U.S...
